# Tianyuan Waterproof (TY-SHIELD™)

Professional manufacturer and global supplier of high-quality waterproofing materials. Located in Shouguang, China's "Waterproofing Capital", Weifang Tianyuan Waterproof Material Co., Ltd. specializes in R&D, production, and export of advanced waterproofing systems for global infrastructure.

## Core Products
- **Bitumen Waterproofing Membranes**: SBS/APP modified bitumen, self-adhesive membranes, and asphalt roofing felt.
- **Polymer Membranes**: High-performance PVC, TPO, EPDM, and pre-applied HDPE membranes.
- **Waterproof Coatings**: Polyurethane, JS polymer-cement, and acrylic liquid-applied coatings.
- **Self-Adhesive Tapes**: Butyl sealant tapes and flashing materials for joint sealing.
- **Asphalt Shingles**: 3-Tab, laminated, and artistic shingles for residential roofing.
- **Geosynthetics**: Nonwoven geotextiles and HDPE geomembrane liners for landfills and aquaculture.
